memoryAudit.method: same-session baseline heap usage -> 3 scroll/nav/wait cycles -> forced Runtime.gc/HeapProfiler.collectGarbage after each cycle -> final heap snapshot summary

principles.summary: User preference probes including reduced-motion did not raise a finding.
Pending active keyboard/focus/input-modality test; screenshot/DOM evidence is not treated as a pass.
Pending active wayfinding/search/menu-flow test; passive homepage evidence is not treated as a pass.
No issue found in this batch evidence.
Mobile layout showed no horizontal overflow.
Primary homepage entry point rendered; task completion flow not exercised.
Batch layout CLS 0.001; deeper LCP/INP merged from CDP coordinator data. Lighthouse/trace evidence is pending for this site; current judgement is based on layout/CLS/HAR only.
Axe was blocked or failed, so no automated accessibility violation is asserted; judgement is based on DOM probes only.
Basic metadata/viewport probes passed; Lighthouse not run in this scale batch. Lighthouse best-practices evidence is pending for this site.
Discoverability and Lighthouse SEO evidence did not raise a finding.
Network surface looked bounded in batch evidence (15 requests).
Pending active no-JS/offline/reload resilience test; manifest/service-worker presence alone is not treated as a pass.
html lang='en'; deeper locale flows not tested.
Pending active consent/account/commerce-flow review for dark patterns; passive homepage evidence is not treated as a pass.
Same-session memory pass retained 0.8 MB after interaction cycles and forced GC; no monotonic leak signal above threshold.

verdict: Homepage batch: no asserted findings in this evidence pass; axe may be low-confidence if blocked.
_caveats: Scale batch: no Lighthouse, LCP or INP in this pass; coordinator CDP data should fill objective metrics.
Memory is a single heap snapshot, not a repeated-interaction leak proof.
Dark-mode/reduced-motion are inferred from probes unless separately captured.
Axe blocked/failed; be-inclusive marked low-confidence pass rather than issue.
Memory principle pending rigorous same-session recheck; no pass/issue asserted from single/coarse heap snapshots.
Passive-only principles patched: trustworthy/resilient/natural-interactions/guided-navigation require active flow testing and are not counted as passes.

Lighthouse/trace/reduced-motion video were not collected in the original batch; future batches include them and this site needs supplemental evidence for high-confidence performance/reduced-motion claims.
Supplemental Lighthouse/trace/reduced-motion evidence collected and merged.
Memory was rechecked with same-session baseline, 3 interaction cycles, forced GC, and final heap snapshot; still a homepage smoke test, not full memlab trace attribution.
